home.title: SUMS — Bridging Education & Industry in Nepal
home.description: SUMS connects students, institutions, and industry through an integrated ecosystem of platforms — Cogknit, SIP, and AIC. 1,500+ students. 15+ institutions. 7 countries.
home.keywords: SUMS, education Nepal, EdTech, students, industry, skills gap, Cogknit, SIP, AIC, learning platform, academia, university, Nepal

cogknit.title: Cogknit — Smart Learning Platform | SUMS
cogknit.description: Cogknit is SUMS's smart learning platform designed to bridge the gap between academic curricula and real-world professional skills for students across Nepal.
cogknit.keywords: Cogknit, smart learning, EdTech Nepal, AI learning platform, online courses, professional skills, student learning

sip.title: SIP — Student Innovators Program | SUMS
sip.description: The Student Innovators Program (SIP) connects students with real-world projects, industry mentors, and innovation opportunities — turning classroom knowledge into professional experience.
sip.keywords: SIP, Student Innovators Program, innovation Nepal, student entrepreneurship, industry mentorship, startup, project-based learning

aic.title: AIC — Academia Industry Collaboration | SUMS
aic.description: AIC (Academia Industry Collaboration) creates structured, lasting partnerships between universities and industry leaders to align education with real market demands.
aic.keywords: AIC, Academia Industry Collaboration, university industry partnership, Nepal education reform, institutional collaboration, market-aligned curriculum
